---
title: "phase2_for_thesis"
author: "firdaus"
format: 
  docx:
    theme: cosmo
    toc: true
    toc-location: left
    toc-depth: 6
    number-sections: true
    self-contained: true
editor: visual
---

# Preliminaries

## Load Library

```{r setup, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(readxl)
library(foreign)
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
library(gt)
library(gtsummary)
library(haven)
library(corrplot)
library(tidyr)
library(broom)
library(GGally)   # for ggpairs
library(rsq)      # for R2
library(car)
library(broom)
library(dplyr)
library(forcats)
```

## Load Data

```{r}
data1 = read_excel("Phase 2 for thesis.xlsx")
names(data1)
head(data1)
dim(data1)
```

### Dividing the data into sections

```{r}
parent_vars <- c(
  "Timestamp","Nama","IC","Telefon","Umur","Umur_Corrected","Jantina_Parent",
  "Warganegara","Bangsa","Bangsa_Collapsed","Negeri","Zon_Negeri","Status_Perkahwinan","Status_Perkahwinan_Collapsed","Pekerjaan_Utama",
  "Pendidikan","Pendapatan","Bil_Anak","Bil_Anak_Autisme","Sex_Ed_Childhood",
  "Support_Group","Persatuan_Autisme","Facebook_Group_Autisme","Whatsapp_Group_Autisme",
  "Tiada_Kumpulan_Sokongan","Support_Group_Status","Status_Kumpulan_Sokongan_Keseluruhan")

adolescent_vars <- c(
  "Umur_Anak","Umur_Anak_Autisme","Jantina_Anak","Baligh","Severity_ASD",
  "Inappropriate_Sex_Behaviour","Melancap_Hadapan_Orang_Lain","Berbogel_Hadapan_Orang_Lain",
  "Sentuh_Ahli_Keluarga_Tidak_Sesuai","Sentuh_Orang_Lain_Tidak_Sesuai",
  "Tingkah_Laku_Tidak_Sesuai_Lain","Tiada_Tingkah_Laku_Tidak_Sesuai","Sejarah_Tingkah_Laku_Tidak_Sesuai_Keseluruhan","Sex_Victimisation")


knowledge_vars <- c(
  "K1","K2","K3","K4","K5","K6","K7","K8","K9","K10","K11","K12","K13",
  "K14","K15","K16","K17","K18","K19","K20","K21","K22","K23","K24","K25",
  "K26","K27","K28","K29","K30","K31","K32","K33"
)

attitude_vars <- c(
  "A1","A2","A3","A4","A5","A6","A7","A8","A9","A10","A11",
  "A12","A13","A14","A15","A16","A17","A18","A19","A20","A21"
)

practice_vars <- c(
  "P1","P2","P3","P4","P5","P6","P7","P8","P9","P10","P11",
  "P12","P13","P14","P15","P16","P17","P18","P19","P20","P21"
)


data1 <- data1 %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.character),as_factor)) %>%
  mutate(
    Umur_Anak_Autisme = as.numeric(as.character(Umur_Anak_Autisme))
  )

```

### Coding Knowledge Section

```{r}
knowledge_items <- paste0("K", 1:33)
```

Identify Reverse-Coded Knowledge Items

```{r}
reverse_items <- c("K1", "K2", "K3", "K4")

```

Recode Raw Responses (Ya / Tidak / Tidak pasti)

This converts:

"Ya" → 1

"Tidak" → 0

"Tidak pasti" → 2

Reverse items flip 1 ↔ 0

```{r}
data1 <- data1 %>%
  mutate(across(
    .cols = setdiff(knowledge_items, reverse_items),
    .fns = ~ case_when(
      tolower(as.character(.)) == "ya"           ~ 1,
      tolower(as.character(.)) == "tidak"        ~ 0,
      tolower(as.character(.)) == "tidak pasti"  ~ 2,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    )
  )) %>%
  mutate(across(
    .cols = reverse_items,
    .fns = ~ case_when(
      tolower(as.character(.)) == "ya"           ~ 0,   # reverse
      tolower(as.character(.)) == "tidak"        ~ 1,
      tolower(as.character(.)) == "tidak pasti"  ~ 2,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    )
  ))

```

**Convert to Dichotomous (Correct = 1, Incorrect = 0)**

Correct = 1

Incorrect = 0 or 2

```{r}
knowledge_dicho <- data1 %>%
  mutate(across(
    .cols = all_of(knowledge_items),
    .fns = ~ case_when(
      . == 1 ~ 1,       # correct
      . %in% c(0, 2) ~ 0, # incorrect
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    )
  )) 

```

```{r}
summary(knowledge_dicho)
str(knowledge_dicho)

```

#### Define Knowledge Subdomain

```{r}
# Full list of K items
knowledge_items <- paste0("K", 1:33)

# Define subdomains
sub1_items  <- c("K1","K2","K3","K4")                          # Sexual Development
sub2_items  <- c("K5","K6","K7","K8","K9")                     # Contributing Factors
sub3_items  <- c("K10","K11","K12","K13","K14")                # Rights & Autonomy
sub4a_items <- c("K15","K20","K21","K22")                      # Consequences of Sexual Abuse
sub4b_items <- c("K16","K17","K18","K19")                      # Signs of Sexual Abuse
sub5a_items <- c("K23","K24","K25","K26","K27")                # Inappropriate Sexual Behaviour
sub5b_items <- c("K28","K29","K30")                            # Consequences of ISB
sub6_items  <- c("K31","K32","K33")                            # Sexual Health Education

```

#### Create Total Knowledge Score

```{r}
knowledge_scores <- knowledge_dicho %>%
  mutate(
    Knowledge_Sub1  = rowSums(across(all_of(sub1_items)),  na.rm = TRUE),
    Knowledge_Sub2  = rowSums(across(all_of(sub2_items)),  na.rm = TRUE),
    Knowledge_Sub3  = rowSums(across(all_of(sub3_items)),  na.rm = TRUE),
    Knowledge_Sub4a = rowSums(across(all_of(sub4a_items)), na.rm = TRUE),
    Knowledge_Sub4b = rowSums(across(all_of(sub4b_items)), na.rm = TRUE),
    Knowledge_Sub5a = rowSums(across(all_of(sub5a_items)), na.rm = TRUE),
    Knowledge_Sub5b = rowSums(across(all_of(sub5b_items)), na.rm = TRUE),
    Knowledge_Sub6  = rowSums(across(all_of(sub6_items)),  na.rm = TRUE),

    # Total knowledge score
    Knowledge_Total = rowSums(across(all_of(knowledge_items)), na.rm = TRUE)
  )


```

attach this back to main dataset

```{r}
data1 <- bind_cols(
  data1,
  knowledge_scores %>% select(
    Knowledge_Sub1, Knowledge_Sub2, Knowledge_Sub3,
    Knowledge_Sub4a, Knowledge_Sub4b, Knowledge_Sub5a,
    Knowledge_Sub5b, Knowledge_Sub6, Knowledge_Total
  )
)


```

```{r}
summary(data1$Knowledge_Total)
hist(data1$Knowledge_Total, main="Knowledge Total Score", xlab="Score")


summary(data1$Knowledge_Sub1)
summary(data1$Knowledge_Sub6)

names(data1)


```

### Coding Attitude Section

#### Define Attitude items + subdomains

```{r}
attitude_items <- paste0("A", 1:21)

sexed_importance_items <- c("A1","A2","A3","A4","A5","A6")
sexed_concerns_items   <- c("A7","A8","A9")
soc_sensitivity_items  <- c("A10","A11","A12")
parent_role_items      <- c("A13","A14","A15","A16","A17","A18","A19","A20","A21")
```

#### Reverse-scored items & Likert mapping functions (normal + reverse)

```{r}
reverse_att_items <- c("A7","A8","A9","A10","A11","A12")

likert_map <- function(x) {
  recode <- c(
    "sangat tidak setuju" = 1,
    "tidak setuju"        = 2,
    "tidak pasti"         = 3,
    "setuju"              = 4,
    "sangat setuju"       = 5
  )
  x <- str_squish(tolower(as.character(x)))
  recode[match(x, names(recode))]
}

likert_reverse <- function(x) {
  recode <- c(
    "sangat tidak setuju" = 5,
    "tidak setuju"        = 4,
    "tidak pasti"         = 3,
    "setuju"              = 2,
    "sangat setuju"       = 1
  )
  x <- str_squish(tolower(as.character(x)))
  recode[match(x, names(recode))]
}
```

#### Recode the Attitude section

```{r}
attitude_recoded <- data1 %>%
  select(all_of(attitude_items)) %>%
  mutate(
    across(
      .cols = setdiff(attitude_items, reverse_att_items),
      .fns  = ~ likert_map(.)
    ),
    across(
      .cols = all_of(reverse_att_items),
      .fns  = ~ likert_reverse(.)
    )
  ) %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), as.numeric))

# Quick check
summary(attitude_recoded)


```

#### Compute subdomain + total scores (rowSums of 1–5 Likert after reverse scoring)

```{r}
data1 <- data1 %>%
  select(-all_of(attitude_items)) %>%
  bind_cols(attitude_recoded)
```

```{r}
data1 <- data1 %>%
  mutate(
    Att_Sub1_SexEdImportance = rowSums(across(all_of(sexed_importance_items)), na.rm = TRUE),
    Att_Sub2_SexEdConcerns   = rowSums(across(all_of(sexed_concerns_items)),   na.rm = TRUE),
    Att_Sub3_SocSensitivity  = rowSums(across(all_of(soc_sensitivity_items)),  na.rm = TRUE),
    Att_Sub4_ParentRole      = rowSums(across(all_of(parent_role_items)),      na.rm = TRUE),
    Att_Total                = rowSums(across(all_of(attitude_items)),         na.rm = TRUE)
  )
```

Bind new scores back to data1

```{r}
# Check new variables
summary(data1$Att_Total)
hist(data1$Att_Total, main = "Attitude Total Score", xlab = "Score")
names(data1)

```

### Coding Practice Section

#### Define Practice items + subdomains

```{r}
practice_items <- paste0("P", 1:21)

teaching_items <- c("P1","P2","P3","P4","P5","P6","P7","P8","P9","P15","P16")
monitoring_items <- c("P10","P11","P12","P13","P14")
involvement_items <- c("P17","P18","P19","P20","P21")
```

#### Likert mapping function

```{r}
likert_practice_map <- function(x) {
  recode <- c(
    "tidak pernah"   = 1,
    "jarang"         = 2,
    "kadang-kadang"  = 3,
    "selalu"         = 4,
    "sentiasa"       = 5
  )
  x <- str_squish(tolower(as.character(x)))
  recode[match(x, names(recode))]
}
```

#### Recode the practice section

```{r}
practice_recoded <- data1 %>%
  select(all_of(practice_items)) %>%
  mutate(across(
    everything(),
    ~ likert_practice_map(.)   # maps to numbers 1–5
  )) %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), as.numeric))

# Quick check
summary(practice_recoded)
```

#### Compute subdomain + total scores

```{r}
practice_scores <- practice_recoded %>%
  mutate(
    Pra_Sub1_Teaching    = rowSums(across(all_of(teaching_items)), na.rm = TRUE),
    Pra_Sub2_Monitoring  = rowSums(across(all_of(monitoring_items)), na.rm = TRUE),
    Pra_Sub3_Involvement = rowSums(across(all_of(involvement_items)), na.rm = TRUE),
    Pra_Total            = rowSums(across(all_of(practice_items)),   na.rm = TRUE)
  )
```

Bind back to data1

```{r}
data1 <- bind_cols(
  data1,
  practice_scores %>%
    select(Pra_Sub1_Teaching, Pra_Sub2_Monitoring, Pra_Sub3_Involvement, Pra_Total)
)



# Check
summary(data1$Pra_Total)
class(data1$Pra_Total)        # MUST show "numeric"
hist(data1$Pra_Total, main="Practice Total Score", xlab="Score")
names(data1)

```

# Descriptive Statistics

## Parental Characteristics

```{r}
exclude_parent <- c("Timestamp","Nama","IC","Telefon","Umur","Support_Group", "Status_Perkahwinan", "Persatuan_Autisme", "Facebook_Group_Autisme", "Whatsapp_Group_Autisme", "Tiada_Kumpulan_Sokongan", "Support_Group_Status")

exclude_adolescent <- c(  "Inappropriate_Sex_Behaviour", "Umur_Anak", "Tiada_Tingkah_Laku_Tidak_Sesuai")

parent_vars_final <- setdiff(parent_vars, exclude_parent)
adolescent_vars_final <- setdiff(adolescent_vars, exclude_adolescent)
```

```{r}
tbl_parent <- data1 %>%
  select(all_of(parent_vars_final)) %>%
  tbl_summary(
    type = list(
      all_continuous() ~ "continuous",
      all_categorical() ~ "categorical"
    ),
    statistic = list(
      all_continuous() ~ "{mean} ({sd})",
      all_categorical() ~ "{n} ({p}%)"
    ),
    digits = all_continuous() ~ 2,
    missing = "ifany"
  ) %>%
  modify_header(label = "**Parental Characteristics**") %>%
  bold_labels()

tbl_parent

```

## Adolescent Characteristics

```{r}
class(data1$Umur_Anak_Autisme)
unique(data1$Umur_Anak_Autisme)[1:10]
```

```{r}
tbl_adolescent <- data1 %>%
  select(all_of(adolescent_vars_final)) %>%
  tbl_summary(
    type = list(
      all_continuous() ~ "continuous",
      all_categorical() ~ "categorical"
    ),
    statistic = list(
      all_continuous() ~ "{mean} ({sd})",
      all_categorical() ~ "{n} ({p}%)"
    ),
    digits = all_continuous() ~ 2,
    missing = "ifany"
  ) %>%
  modify_header(label = "**Adolescent Characteristics**") %>%
  bold_labels()

tbl_adolescent

```

## Mean Score for Knowledge, Attitude and Practice

```{r}

# Create a dataframe with the 3 total variables
kap_totals <- data1 %>%
  select(Knowledge_Total, Att_Total, Pra_Total)

# Create gtsummary table with mean, sd, min, max
tbl_kap <- tbl_summary(
  kap_totals,
  type = all_continuous() ~ "continuous2",
  statistic = all_continuous() ~ "{mean} ({sd}); Min={min}, Max={max}",
  digits = all_continuous() ~ 2
) %>%
  modify_header(label = "**KAP Total Scores**") %>%
  bold_labels()

tbl_kap

```

```{r}

# Select only total KAP scores
kap_totals <- data1 %>%
  select(Knowledge_Total, Att_Total, Pra_Total)

# Create summary dataframe manually
kap_summary <- kap_totals %>%
  summarise(
    Knowledge_Mean_SD = sprintf("%.2f (%.2f)",
                                mean(Knowledge_Total, na.rm = TRUE),
                                sd(Knowledge_Total, na.rm = TRUE)),
    Knowledge_Min_Max = sprintf("%.0f – %.0f",
                                min(Knowledge_Total, na.rm = TRUE),
                                max(Knowledge_Total, na.rm = TRUE)),
    
    Att_Mean_SD = sprintf("%.2f (%.2f)",
                          mean(Att_Total, na.rm = TRUE),
                          sd(Att_Total, na.rm = TRUE)),
    Att_Min_Max = sprintf("%.0f – %.0f",
                          min(Att_Total, na.rm = TRUE),
                          max(Att_Total, na.rm = TRUE)),
    
    Pra_Mean_SD = sprintf("%.2f (%.2f)",
                          mean(Pra_Total, na.rm = TRUE),
                          sd(Pra_Total, na.rm = TRUE)),
    Pra_Min_Max = sprintf("%.0f – %.0f",
                          min(Pra_Total, na.rm = TRUE),
                          max(Pra_Total, na.rm = TRUE))
  ) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_longer(
    everything(),
    names_to = "Measure",
    values_to = "Value"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Domain = case_when(
      grepl("^Knowledge", Measure) ~ "Knowledge_Total",
      grepl("^Att", Measure) ~ "Att_Total",
      grepl("^Pra", Measure) ~ "Pra_Total"
    ),
    Statistic = case_when(
      grepl("Mean_SD", Measure) ~ "Mean (SD)",
      grepl("Min_Max", Measure) ~ "Min – Max"
    )
  ) %>%
  select(Domain, Statistic, Value)

# Create GT table
gt_table <- kap_summary %>%
  gt(groupname_col = "Domain") %>%
  tab_header(
    title = md("**KAP Total Score Summary**"),
    subtitle = "Mean (SD) and Min–Max per Domain"
  ) %>%
  cols_label(
    Statistic = "Statistic",
    Value = "Value"
  ) %>%
  fmt_markdown(columns = everything())

gt_table


```

### Mean score for Subdomains

```{r}
# Knowledge subdomains
knowledge_subdomains <- c(
  "Knowledge_Sub1", "Knowledge_Sub2", "Knowledge_Sub3",
  "Knowledge_Sub4a", "Knowledge_Sub4b",
  "Knowledge_Sub5a", "Knowledge_Sub5b",
  "Knowledge_Sub6"
)

# Attitude subdomains
attitude_subdomains <- c(
  "Att_Sub1_SexEdImportance",
  "Att_Sub2_SexEdConcerns",
  "Att_Sub3_SocSensitivity",
  "Att_Sub4_ParentRole"
)

# Practice subdomains
practice_subdomains <- c(
  "Pra_Sub1_Teaching",
  "Pra_Sub2_Monitoring",
  "Pra_Sub3_Involvement"
)


```

```{r}
make_subdomain_summary <- function(df, vars, domain_label){
  df %>%
    summarise(across(
      all_of(vars),
      list(
        Mean_SD = ~ sprintf("%.2f (%.2f)", mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE), sd(.x, na.rm = TRUE)),
        Min_Max = ~ sprintf("%.0f – %.0f", min(.x, na.rm = TRUE), max(.x, na.rm = TRUE))
      ),
      .names = "{.col}_{.fn}"
    )) %>%
    tidyr::pivot_longer(
      everything(),
      names_to = "Measure",
      values_to = "Value"
    ) %>%
    separate(Measure, into = c("Variable", "Statistic"), sep = "_(?=[^_]+$)") %>%
    mutate(Domain = domain_label) %>%
    select(Domain, Variable, Statistic, Value)
}

```

```{r}
knowledge_summary <- make_subdomain_summary(data1, knowledge_subdomains, "Knowledge")
attitude_summary  <- make_subdomain_summary(data1, attitude_subdomains,  "Attitude")
practice_summary  <- make_subdomain_summary(data1, practice_subdomains,  "Practice")

```

```{r}
kap_subdomain_summary <- bind_rows(
  knowledge_summary,
  attitude_summary,
  practice_summary
)

```

```{r}
kap_subdomain_table <- kap_subdomain_summary %>%
  gt(groupname_col = "Domain", rowname_col = "Variable") %>%
  tab_header(
    title = md("**KAP Subdomain Score Summary**"),
    subtitle = "Mean (SD) and Min–Max for Each Subdomain"
  ) %>%
  cols_label(
    Statistic = "Statistic",
    Value = "Value"
  ) %>%
  fmt_markdown(columns = everything()) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = list(cell_text(weight = "bold")),
    locations = cells_column_labels(everything())
  )

kap_subdomain_table

```

# Linear Regression

## Define the Independent Variables

#### Predictor for Knowledge

```{r}
data2_remove_vars <- c(
  "Timestamp","Nama","IC","Telefon","Umur","Support_Group", 
  "Status_Perkahwinan", "Persatuan_Autisme", "Facebook_Group_Autisme", 
  "Whatsapp_Group_Autisme", "Tiada_Kumpulan_Sokongan", 
  "Support_Group_Status", "Inappropriate_Sex_Behaviour", 
  "Umur_Anak", "Tiada_Tingkah_Laku_Tidak_Sesuai",  
  "Melancap_Hadapan_Orang_Lain","Berbogel_Hadapan_Orang_Lain",
  "Sentuh_Ahli_Keluarga_Tidak_Sesuai","Sentuh_Orang_Lain_Tidak_Sesuai",
  "Tingkah_Laku_Tidak_Sesuai_Lain","Negeri","Bangsa","Warganegara", 
  paste0("K",1:33),
  paste0("A",1:21),
  paste0("P",1:21), 
  "Knowledge_Sub1", "Knowledge_Sub2", "Knowledge_Sub3",  "Knowledge_Sub4a", "Knowledge_Sub4b",  "Knowledge_Sub5a", "Knowledge_Sub5b",
  "Knowledge_Sub6",   "Att_Sub1_SexEdImportance",  "Att_Sub2_SexEdConcerns",  "Att_Sub3_SocSensitivity",  "Att_Sub4_ParentRole",
  "Pra_Sub1_Teaching",  "Pra_Sub2_Monitoring",  "Pra_Sub3_Involvement")

data2 <- data1 %>%
  select(-all_of(data2_remove_vars))

data2 <- data2 %>%
  mutate(
    Pendapatan_raw = Pendapatan,        # keep original
    Pendapatan = Pendapatan / 1000      # overwrite with scaled version
  )

data2 <- data2 %>% 
  mutate(
    Pekerjaan_Utama = fct_relevel(Pekerjaan_Utama, "Suri rumah / Suami rumah"),
    Pendidikan      = fct_relevel(Pendidikan, "Sekolah Rendah & Lain - lain"),
    Severity_ASD    = fct_relevel(Severity_ASD, "Tahap 1 - Memerlukan Sokongan"),
    Zon_Negeri      = fct_relevel(Zon_Negeri, "Zon Sentral"),
    Status_Kumpulan_Sokongan_Keseluruhan = fct_relevel(Status_Kumpulan_Sokongan_Keseluruhan, "Tiada Kumpulan Sokongan"),
    Sejarah_Tingkah_Laku_Tidak_Sesuai_Keseluruhan = fct_relevel(Sejarah_Tingkah_Laku_Tidak_Sesuai_Keseluruhan, "Tiada Sejarah Tingkah Laku Tidak Sesuai")
                      
  )


head(data2)

```

```{r}
data2%>%
  select(where(is.numeric)) %>%
  ggpairs()


```

# Knowledge

```{r}
names(data2)
```

## Simple Linear Regression

To screen

```{r}
slr_knowledge0 <- lm(Knowledge_Total ~ 1, data = data2)  # intercept only model

add1(slr_knowledge0, scope = ~  Umur_Corrected + Jantina_Parent + Bangsa_Collapsed + Zon_Negeri + Status_Perkahwinan_Collapsed +  Pekerjaan_Utama + Pendidikan + Pendapatan + Bil_Anak + Bil_Anak_Autisme + Sex_Ed_Childhood + Status_Kumpulan_Sokongan_Keseluruhan + Umur_Anak_Autisme + Jantina_Anak + Baligh + Severity_ASD + Sejarah_Tingkah_Laku_Tidak_Sesuai_Keseluruhan + Sex_Victimisation,     test = "F")
```

To get crude b, 95% CI and p-value\

```{r}
predictors_knowledge <- c(
  "Umur_Corrected", "Jantina_Parent", "Bangsa_Collapsed", "Zon_Negeri",
  "Status_Perkahwinan_Collapsed", "Pekerjaan_Utama", "Pendidikan", 
  "Pendapatan", "Bil_Anak", "Bil_Anak_Autisme", "Sex_Ed_Childhood",
  "Status_Kumpulan_Sokongan_Keseluruhan", "Umur_Anak_Autisme", 
  "Jantina_Anak", "Baligh", "Severity_ASD", 
  "Sejarah_Tingkah_Laku_Tidak_Sesuai_Keseluruhan", "Sex_Victimisation"
)
```

```{r}
crude_results_knowledge <- lapply(predictors_knowledge, function(v) {
  fmla <- as.formula(paste("Knowledge_Total ~", v))
  model_knowledge <- lm(fmla, data = data2)
  out <- tidy(model_knowledge, conf.int = TRUE)
  out$predictor <- v
  out[out$term != "(Intercept)", ]  # keep only the predictor row
})

crude_results_knowledge <- do.call(rbind, crude_results_knowledge)

crude_results_knowledge

```

```{r}
crude_results_knowledge <- crude_results_knowledge[, 
  c("predictor", "term", "estimate", "conf.low", "conf.high", "p.value")
]

```

```{r}
tbl_crude_knowledge <- 
  tbl_uvregression(
    data = data2,
    y = Knowledge_Total,       # outcome variable
    method = lm,               # linear regression
    exponentiate = FALSE,      # B coefficient, not OR
    include = c(
      Umur_Corrected, Jantina_Parent, Bangsa_Collapsed, Zon_Negeri,
      Status_Perkahwinan_Collapsed, Pekerjaan_Utama, Pendidikan, 
      Pendapatan, Bil_Anak, Bil_Anak_Autisme, Sex_Ed_Childhood,
      Status_Kumpulan_Sokongan_Keseluruhan, Umur_Anak_Autisme, 
      Jantina_Anak, Baligh, Severity_ASD, 
      Sejarah_Tingkah_Laku_Tidak_Sesuai_Keseluruhan, Sex_Victimisation
    )
  ) %>%
  bold_p(t = 0.05) %>%   # bold p < 0.05
  add_n()                # add sample size column

tbl_crude_knowledge
```

Double check Pendidikan

```{r}
slr.pendidikan <- lm(Knowledge_Total ~ Pendidikan, data = data2)
summary(slr.pendidikan)
tidy(slr.pendidikan, conf.int = TRUE)
```

## Multiple Linear Regression

### Variable Selection

#### Enter Selection

```{r}
mlr_knowledge <- lm(Knowledge_Total ~ Jantina_Parent + Bangsa_Collapsed + Zon_Negeri + Status_Perkahwinan_Collapsed +  Pekerjaan_Utama + Pendidikan + Pendapatan + Sex_Ed_Childhood  + Severity_ASD + Sejarah_Tingkah_Laku_Tidak_Sesuai_Keseluruhan, data = data2)

summary(mlr_knowledge)
```

#### Forward Selection

```{r}
mlr_knowledge_stepforward <- step(slr_knowledge0, scope = ~ Jantina_Parent + Bangsa_Collapsed + Zon_Negeri + Status_Perkahwinan_Collapsed +  Pekerjaan_Utama + Pendidikan + Pendapatan + Sex_Ed_Childhood  + Severity_ASD + Sejarah_Tingkah_Laku_Tidak_Sesuai_Keseluruhan , 
                            direction = "forward")


```

#### Backward Selection

```{r}
mlr_knowledge_stepback <- step(mlr_knowledge, direction = "backward")
```

#### Bidirectional selection

```{r}
mlr_knowledge_stepboth <- step(mlr_knowledge, direction = "both")
```

Variable Selected based on forward, backward and bidirectional : Jantina_Parent + Bangsa_Collapsed + Status_Perkahwinan_Collapsed + Pekerjaan_Utama + Pendidikan

## Preliminary model

```{r}
mlr_knowledge_prelim <- lm(Knowledge_Total ~ Jantina_Parent + Bangsa_Collapsed + Status_Perkahwinan_Collapsed + 
    Pekerjaan_Utama + Pendidikan, data = data2)
summary(mlr_knowledge_prelim)
```

#### Multicollinearity Check (VIF)

```{r}
vif(mlr_knowledge_prelim, type = "predictor")
```

The GVIF results indicate that all predictors in the multiple linear regression model exhibit low multicollinearity, with GVIF values ranging from 1.11 to 1.56 and adjusted GVIF\^(1/(2·Df)) values between 1.01 and 1.12. These values are well below the commonly accepted thresholds (GVIF \> 5 or adjusted GVIF \> 2), suggesting that the predictors are sufficiently independent. Therefore, multicollinearity is not a concern in this model, and all variables can be retained without compromising coefficient stability or interpretability.

#### Checking Interaction

```{r}
mlr_knowledge_prelim <- lm(Knowledge_Total ~ Jantina_Parent + Bangsa_Collapsed + Status_Perkahwinan_Collapsed + 
    Pekerjaan_Utama + Pendidikan, data = data2)
```

##### Jantina_Parent : Bangsa_Collapsed

```{r}
summary(glm(Knowledge_Total ~ Jantina_Parent + Bangsa_Collapsed + Status_Perkahwinan_Collapsed + 
    Pekerjaan_Utama + Pendidikan + Jantina_Parent : Bangsa_Collapsed , data = data2))
```

No interaction Jantina_Parent : Bangsa_Collapsed

##### Jantina_Parent : Status_Perkahwinan_Collapsed

```{r}
summary(glm(Knowledge_Total ~ Jantina_Parent + Bangsa_Collapsed + Status_Perkahwinan_Collapsed + 
    Pekerjaan_Utama + Pendidikan + Jantina_Parent : Status_Perkahwinan_Collapsed , data = data2))
```

No interaction Jantina_Parent : Status_Perkahwinan_Collapsed

##### Jantina_Parent : Pekerjaan_Utama

```{r}
summary(glm(Knowledge_Total ~ Jantina_Parent + Bangsa_Collapsed + Status_Perkahwinan_Collapsed + 
    Pekerjaan_Utama + Pendidikan + Jantina_Parent : Pekerjaan_Utama , data = data2))
```

No interaction Jantina_Parent : Pekerjaan_Utama

##### Jantina_Parent : Pendidikan

```{r}
summary(glm(Knowledge_Total ~ Jantina_Parent + Bangsa_Collapsed + Status_Perkahwinan_Collapsed + 
    Pekerjaan_Utama + Pendidikan + Jantina_Parent : Pendidikan , data = data2))
```

No interaction Jantina_Parent : Pendidikan

##### Bangsa_Collapsed : Status_Perkahwinan_Collapsed

```{r}
summary(glm(Knowledge_Total ~ Jantina_Parent + Bangsa_Collapsed + Status_Perkahwinan_Collapsed + 
    Pekerjaan_Utama + Pendidikan + Bangsa_Collapsed : Status_Perkahwinan_Collapsed , data = data2))
```

No interaction Bangsa_Collapsed : Status_Perkahwinan_Collapsed

##### Bangsa_Collapsed + Pekerjaan_Utama

```{r}
summary(glm(Knowledge_Total ~ Jantina_Parent + Bangsa_Collapsed + Status_Perkahwinan_Collapsed + 
    Pekerjaan_Utama + Pendidikan + Bangsa_Collapsed : Pekerjaan_Utama , data = data2))
```

There is significant interaction

```         
Bangsa_CollapsedBumiputera Sarawak:Pekerjaan_UtamaPenjawat Awam    10.8115     4.3635   2.478  0.01373 *
```

But the model is instable with presence of NA results

##### Bangsa_collapsed : Pendidikan

```{r}
summary(glm(Knowledge_Total ~ Jantina_Parent + Bangsa_Collapsed + Status_Perkahwinan_Collapsed + 
    Pekerjaan_Utama + Pendidikan + Bangsa_Collapsed : Pendidikan , data = data2))
```

1 interaction is significant, however model is unstable due to presence of NA

```         
Bangsa_CollapsedBukan Bumiputera:PendidikanSekolah Rendah & Lain - lain    17.8597     7.0245   2.542 0.011464 *
```

##### Status_Perkahwinan_Collapsed : Pekerjaan_Utama

```{r}
summary(glm(Knowledge_Total ~ Jantina_Parent + Bangsa_Collapsed + Status_Perkahwinan_Collapsed + 
    Pekerjaan_Utama + Pendidikan + Status_Perkahwinan_Collapsed : Pekerjaan_Utama , data = data2))
```

There is 1 significant interaction

```         
Status_Perkahwinan_CollapsedBercerai / Balu / Duda /Lain-lain:Pekerjaan_UtamaBekerja sendiri  -7.9274     4.0213  -1.971   0.0495 * 
```

But the model is unstable due to presence of NA

##### Status_Perkahwinan_Collapsed : Pendidikan

```{r}
summary(glm(Knowledge_Total ~ Jantina_Parent + Bangsa_Collapsed + Status_Perkahwinan_Collapsed + 
    Pekerjaan_Utama + Pendidikan + Status_Perkahwinan_Collapsed : Pendidikan , data = data2))
```

There is significant interaction

```         
Status_Perkahwinan_CollapsedBercerai / Balu / Duda /Lain-lain:PendidikanSekolah Menengah / Kolej -16.5559     7.0272  -2.356   0.0191 *   Status_Perkahwinan_CollapsedBercerai / Balu / Duda /Lain-lain:PendidikanUniversiti               -17.2619     7.2228  -2.390   0.0174 * 
```

Model for interaction terms

```{r}
mlr_knowledge_kahwin.pendidikan <- lm(Knowledge_Total ~ Jantina_Parent + Bangsa_Collapsed + Status_Perkahwinan_Collapsed + 
    Pekerjaan_Utama + Pendidikan + Status_Perkahwinan_Collapsed : Pendidikan , data = data2)
summary(mlr_knowledge_kahwin.pendidikan)
```

### Model fit assessment

#### Percentage of variance explained, R2

```{r}
rsq(mlr_knowledge_prelim, adj = TRUE)
rsq(mlr_knowledge_kahwin.pendidikan, adj = TRUE)
```

#### Histogram and box-and-whiskers plot

To assess the normality of raw/unstandardized residuals of the MLR model.

```{r}
rraw_knowledge <- resid(mlr_knowledge_prelim)
hist(rraw_knowledge)

rraw_knowledge.interaction <- resid(mlr_knowledge_kahwin.pendidikan)
hist(rraw_knowledge.interaction)

```

```{r}
boxplot(rraw_knowledge)

boxplot(rraw_knowledge.interaction)
```

#### Normality of residuals

```{r}
plot(mlr_knowledge_prelim, which = 2)  # Q-Q plot
shapiro.test(resid(mlr_knowledge_prelim))

plot(mlr_knowledge_kahwin.pendidikan, which = 2)  # Q-Q plot
shapiro.test(resid(mlr_knowledge_kahwin.pendidikan))
```

#### Scatter plots

standardized residuals vs standardized predicted values plot

```{r}
rstd_knowledge <- rstandard(mlr_knowledge_prelim)  # standardized residuals
pstd_knowledge <- scale(predict(mlr_knowledge_prelim))  # standardized predicted values
plot(rstd_knowledge ~ pstd_knowledge, xlab = "Std predicted", ylab = "Std residuals")
abline(0, 0)  # normal, linear, equal variance


rstd_knowledge.interaction <- rstandard(mlr_knowledge_kahwin.pendidikan)  # standardized residuals
pstd_knowledge.interaction <- scale(predict(mlr_knowledge_kahwin.pendidikan))  # standardized predicted values
plot(rstd_knowledge.interaction ~ pstd_knowledge.interaction, xlab = "Std predicted", ylab = "Std residuals")
abline(0, 0)  # normal, linear, equal variance
```

linear relationship between the raw residuals and the observed values of the numerical predictors

```{r}
plot(rraw_knowledge ~ data2$Knowledge_Total, xlab = "Knowledge Total", ylab = "Raw Residuals")
abline(0, 0)

plot(rraw_knowledge.interaction ~ data2$Knowledge_Total, xlab = "Knowledge Total", ylab = "Raw Residuals")
abline(0, 0)
```

```{r}
plot(mlr_knowledge_prelim, which = 1)

plot(mlr_knowledge_kahwin.pendidikan, which = 1)
```

### Comparing Model with and Without Interaction

```{r}
anova(mlr_knowledge_prelim, mlr_knowledge_kahwin.pendidikan, test = "LRT")
```

Stick with **Model 1 (main effects only, without interaction)** because:

✔ Better parsimony\
✔ More stable coefficients\
✔ No risk of overfitting\
✔ Easier to explain in thesis\
✔ Interaction only produces marginal improvement (p ≈ 0.053)

## Final Model Knowledge

```{r}
tbl_mlr_knowledge <- tbl_regression(
  mlr_knowledge_prelim,
  exponentiate = FALSE,
  conf.int = TRUE) %>%
  add_significance_stars() %>%
  bold_p(t = 0.05) %>%
  bold_labels()%>%
  add_glance_source_note()
tbl_mlr_knowledge

```

```{r}
tbl_mlr_knowledge <- tbl_regression(
  mlr_knowledge_prelim,
  exponentiate = FALSE,
  conf.int = TRUE)
tbl_mlr_knowledge
```

# Attitude

```{r}
slr_att0 <- lm(Att_Total ~ 1, data = data2)  # intercept only model

add1(slr_att0, scope = ~  Umur_Corrected + Jantina_Parent + Bangsa_Collapsed + Zon_Negeri + Status_Perkahwinan_Collapsed +  Pekerjaan_Utama + Pendidikan + Pendapatan + Bil_Anak + Bil_Anak_Autisme + Sex_Ed_Childhood + Status_Kumpulan_Sokongan_Keseluruhan + Umur_Anak_Autisme + Jantina_Anak + Baligh + Severity_ASD + Sejarah_Tingkah_Laku_Tidak_Sesuai_Keseluruhan + Sex_Victimisation + Knowledge_Total,     test = "F")

```

```{r}
tbl_crude_att <- 
  tbl_uvregression(
    data = data2,
    y = Att_Total,       # outcome variable
    method = lm,               # linear regression
    exponentiate = FALSE,      # B coefficient, not OR
    include = c(
      Umur_Corrected, Jantina_Parent, Bangsa_Collapsed, Zon_Negeri,
      Status_Perkahwinan_Collapsed, Pekerjaan_Utama, Pendidikan, 
      Pendapatan, Bil_Anak, Bil_Anak_Autisme, Sex_Ed_Childhood,
      Status_Kumpulan_Sokongan_Keseluruhan, Umur_Anak_Autisme, 
      Jantina_Anak, Baligh, Severity_ASD, 
      Sejarah_Tingkah_Laku_Tidak_Sesuai_Keseluruhan, Sex_Victimisation, Knowledge_Total
    )
  ) %>%
  bold_p(t = 0.05) %>%   # bold p < 0.05
  add_n()                # add sample size column

tbl_crude_att
```

## Multiple Linear Regression

### Variable Selection

#### Enter Selection

```{r}
mlr_att <- lm(Att_Total ~ Jantina_Parent + Bangsa_Collapsed + Zon_Negeri + Status_Perkahwinan_Collapsed +  Pekerjaan_Utama + Pendidikan + Pendapatan + Sex_Ed_Childhood  + Severity_ASD + Sejarah_Tingkah_Laku_Tidak_Sesuai_Keseluruhan + Knowledge_Total, data = data2)

summary(mlr_att)
```

![](images/clipboard-9133593.png)

#### Forward Selection

```{r}
mlr_att_stepforward <- step(slr_att0, scope = ~ Bangsa_Collapsed + Zon_Negeri + Status_Perkahwinan_Collapsed +  Pekerjaan_Utama  + Pendidikan + Pendapatan + Bil_Anak_Autisme + Status_Kumpulan_Sokongan_Keseluruhan + Jantina_Anak + Baligh + Severity_ASD + Knowledge_Total  , 
                            direction = "forward")
```

#### Backward selection

```{r}
mlr_attitude_stepback <- step(mlr_att, direction = "backward")
```

#### Bidirectional selection

```{r}
mlr_att_stepboth <- step(mlr_att, direction = "both")
```

Variable Selected based on forward, backward and bidirectional : Bangsa_Collapsed + Pendidikan + Pendapatan + Severity_ASD + Knowledge_Total

## Preliminary Model

```{r}
mlr_att_prelim <- lm(Att_Total ~ Bangsa_Collapsed + Pendidikan + Pendapatan + Severity_ASD + Knowledge_Total, data = data2)
summary(mlr_att_prelim)
```

#### Multicollinearity Check (VIF)

```{r}
vif(mlr_att_prelim, type = "predictor")
```

#### Checking Interaction

##### Bangsa_Collapsed : Pendidikan

```{r}
summary(glm(Att_Total ~ Bangsa_Collapsed + Pendidikan + Pendapatan + Severity_ASD + Knowledge_Total + Bangsa_Collapsed : Pendidikan , data = data2))
```

No interaction Bangsa_Collapsed : Pendidikan

##### Bangsa_Collapsed : Pendapatan

```{r}
summary(glm(Att_Total ~ Bangsa_Collapsed + Pendidikan + Pendapatan + Severity_ASD + Knowledge_Total + Bangsa_Collapsed : Pendapatan , data = data2))
```

No interaction Bangsa_Collapsed : Pendapatan

##### Bangsa_Collapsed : Severity_ASD

```{r}
summary(glm(Att_Total ~ Bangsa_Collapsed + Pendidikan + Pendapatan + Severity_ASD + Knowledge_Total + Bangsa_Collapsed : Severity_ASD , data = data2))
```

No interaction Bangsa_Collapsed : Severity_ASD

##### Bangsa_Collapsed : Knowledge_Total

```{r}
summary(glm(Att_Total ~ Bangsa_Collapsed + Pendidikan + Pendapatan + Severity_ASD + Knowledge_Total + Bangsa_Collapsed : Knowledge_Total , data = data2))
```

There is interaction

```         
Bangsa_CollapsedBumiputera Sarawak:Knowledge_Total       1.046e+00  4.089e-01   2.559  0.01094 * 
```

##### Pendidikan : Pendapatan

```{r}
summary(glm(Att_Total ~ Bangsa_Collapsed + Pendidikan + Pendapatan + Severity_ASD + Knowledge_Total + Pendidikan : Pendapatan , data = data2))
```

There is no interaction

##### Pendidikan : Severity_ASD

```{r}
summary(glm(Att_Total ~ Bangsa_Collapsed + Pendidikan + Pendapatan + Severity_ASD + Knowledge_Total + Pendidikan : Severity_ASD , data = data2))
```

No interaction

##### Pendidikan : Knowledge_Total

```{r}
summary(glm(Att_Total ~ Bangsa_Collapsed + Pendidikan + Pendapatan + Severity_ASD + Knowledge_Total + Pendidikan : Knowledge_Total , data = data2))
```

No interaction

##### Pendapatan : Severity_ASD

```{r}
summary(glm(Att_Total ~ Bangsa_Collapsed + Pendidikan + Pendapatan + Severity_ASD + Knowledge_Total + Pendapatan : Severity_ASD , data = data2))
```

No interaction

##### Pendapatan : Knowledge_Total

```{r}
summary(glm(Att_Total ~ Bangsa_Collapsed + Pendidikan + Pendapatan + Severity_ASD + Knowledge_Total + Pendapatan : Knowledge_Total , data = data2))
```

No interaction

##### Severity_ASD : Knowledge_Total

```{r}
summary(glm(Att_Total ~ Bangsa_Collapsed + Pendidikan + Pendapatan + Severity_ASD + Knowledge_Total + Severity_ASD : Knowledge_Total , data = data2))
```

No interaction

### Comparing Model with and Without Interaction

Models with interaction terms

```{r}
mlr_att_prelim <- lm(Att_Total ~ Bangsa_Collapsed + Pendidikan + Pendapatan + Severity_ASD + Knowledge_Total, data = data2)
```

```{r}
mlr_att_bangsa.knowledge <- lm(Att_Total ~ Bangsa_Collapsed + Pendidikan + Pendapatan + Severity_ASD + Knowledge_Total + Bangsa_Collapsed : Knowledge_Total , data = data2)
summary(mlr_att_bangsa.knowledge)
```

```{r}
anova(mlr_att_prelim, mlr_att_bangsa.knowledge)
```

```{r}
AIC(mlr_att_prelim, mlr_att_bangsa.knowledge)
```

### Model fit assessment

#### Percentage of variance explained, R2

```{r}
rsq(mlr_att_prelim, adj = TRUE)
rsq(mlr_att_bangsa.knowledge, adj = TRUE)
```

#### Histogram and box-and-whiskers plot

To assess the normality of raw/unstandardized residuals of the MLR model.

```{r}
rraw_att <- resid(mlr_att_prelim)
hist(rraw_att)

rraw_att.interaction <- resid(mlr_att_bangsa.knowledge)
hist(rraw_att.interaction)
```

#### Normality of residuals

```{r}
plot(mlr_att_prelim, which = 2)  # Q-Q plot
shapiro.test(resid(mlr_att_prelim))

plot(mlr_att_bangsa.knowledge, which = 2)  # Q-Q plot
shapiro.test(resid(mlr_att_bangsa.knowledge))
```

#### Scatter plots

standardized residuals vs standardized predicted values plot

```{r}
rstd_att <- rstandard(mlr_att_prelim)  # standardized residuals
pstd_att <- scale(predict(mlr_att_prelim))  # standardized predicted values
plot(rstd_att ~ pstd_att, xlab = "Std predicted", ylab = "Std residuals")
abline(0, 0)  # normal, linear, equal variance


rstd_att.interaction <- rstandard(mlr_att_bangsa.knowledge)  # standardized residuals
pstd_att.interaction <- scale(predict(mlr_att_bangsa.knowledge))  # standardized predicted values
plot(rstd_att.interaction ~ pstd_att.interaction, xlab = "Std predicted", ylab = "Std residuals")
abline(0, 0)  # normal, linear, equal variance
```

linear relationship between the raw residuals and the observed values of the numerical predictors

```{r}
plot(rraw_att ~ data2$Att_Total, xlab = "Attitude Total", ylab = "Raw Residuals")
abline(0, 0)

plot(rraw_att.interaction ~ data2$Att_Total, xlab = "Attitude Total", ylab = "Raw Residuals")
abline(0, 0)
```

```{r}
plot(mlr_att_prelim, which = 1)

plot(mlr_att_bangsa.knowledge, which = 1)
```

## Final Model Attitude

```{r}
tbl_kap_att <- tbl_regression(
  mlr_att_prelim,
  exponentiate = FALSE,
  conf.int = TRUE) %>%
  add_significance_stars() %>%
  bold_p(t = 0.05) %>%
  bold_labels()%>%
  add_glance_source_note()
tbl_kap_att
```

```{r}
tbl_kap_att <- tbl_regression(
  mlr_att_prelim,
  exponentiate = FALSE,
  conf.int = TRUE) 
tbl_kap_att
```

# Practice

```{r}
slr_pra0 <- lm(Pra_Total ~ 1, data = data2)  # intercept only model

add1(slr_pra0, scope = ~  Umur_Corrected + Jantina_Parent + Bangsa_Collapsed + Zon_Negeri + Status_Perkahwinan_Collapsed +  Pekerjaan_Utama + Pendidikan + Pendapatan + Bil_Anak + Bil_Anak_Autisme + Sex_Ed_Childhood + Status_Kumpulan_Sokongan_Keseluruhan + Umur_Anak_Autisme + Jantina_Anak + Baligh + Severity_ASD + Sejarah_Tingkah_Laku_Tidak_Sesuai_Keseluruhan + Sex_Victimisation + Knowledge_Total + Att_Total,     test = "F")

```

```{r}
tbl_crude_pra <- 
  tbl_uvregression(
    data = data2,
    y = Pra_Total,       # outcome variable
    method = lm,               # linear regression
    exponentiate = FALSE,      # B coefficient, not OR
    include = c(
      Umur_Corrected, Jantina_Parent, Bangsa_Collapsed, Zon_Negeri,
      Status_Perkahwinan_Collapsed, Pekerjaan_Utama, Pendidikan, 
      Pendapatan, Bil_Anak, Bil_Anak_Autisme, Sex_Ed_Childhood,
      Status_Kumpulan_Sokongan_Keseluruhan, Umur_Anak_Autisme, 
      Jantina_Anak, Baligh, Severity_ASD, 
      Sejarah_Tingkah_Laku_Tidak_Sesuai_Keseluruhan, Sex_Victimisation, Knowledge_Total, Att_Total
    )
  ) %>%
  bold_p(t = 0.05) %>%   # bold p < 0.05
  add_n()                # add sample size column

tbl_crude_pra
```

## Multiple Linear Regression

### Variable Selection

#### Enter Selection

```{r}
mlr_pra <- lm(Pra_Total ~ Umur_Corrected + Status_Perkahwinan_Collapsed + Pendidikan + Bil_Anak_Autisme + Umur_Anak_Autisme + Severity_ASD + Sejarah_Tingkah_Laku_Tidak_Sesuai_Keseluruhan + Knowledge_Total + Att_Total, data = data2)

summary(mlr_pra)
```

#### Forward selection

```{r}
mlr_pra_stepforward <- step(slr_pra0, scope = ~ Umur_Corrected + Status_Perkahwinan_Collapsed + Pendidikan + Bil_Anak_Autisme + Umur_Anak_Autisme + Severity_ASD + Sejarah_Tingkah_Laku_Tidak_Sesuai_Keseluruhan + Knowledge_Total + Att_Total , 
                            direction = "forward")
```

#### Backward selection

```{r}
mlr_pra_stepback <- step(mlr_pra, direction = "backward")
```

#### Bidirectional selection

```{r}
mlr_pra_stepboth <- step(mlr_pra, direction = "both")
```

Variable Selected based on forward, backward and bidirectional : Umur_Corrected + Pendidikan + Bil_Anak_Autisme + Umur_Anak_Autisme + Severity_ASD + Knowledge_Total + Att_Total

## Preliminary Model

```{r}
mlr_pra_prelim <- lm(Pra_Total ~ Umur_Corrected + Pendidikan +  Bil_Anak_Autisme + Umur_Anak_Autisme + Severity_ASD + Knowledge_Total + Att_Total, data = data2)
summary(mlr_pra_prelim)
```

#### Multicollinearity Check (VIF)

```{r}
vif(mlr_pra_prelim, type = "predictor")
```

#### Checking Interaction

##### Umur_Corrected : Pendidikan

```{r}
summary(glm(Pra_Total ~ Umur_Corrected + Pendidikan +  Bil_Anak_Autisme + Umur_Anak_Autisme + Severity_ASD + Knowledge_Total + Att_Total + Umur_Corrected : Pendidikan , data = data2))
```

No interaction

##### Umur_Corrected : Bil_Anak_Autisme

```{r}
summary(glm(Pra_Total ~ Umur_Corrected + Pendidikan +  Bil_Anak_Autisme + Umur_Anak_Autisme + Severity_ASD + Knowledge_Total + Att_Total + Umur_Corrected : Bil_Anak_Autisme , data = data2))
```

No interaction

##### Umur_Corrected : Umur_Anak_Autisme

```{r}
summary(glm(Pra_Total ~ Umur_Corrected + Pendidikan +  Bil_Anak_Autisme + Umur_Anak_Autisme + Severity_ASD + Knowledge_Total + Att_Total + Umur_Corrected : Umur_Anak_Autisme , data = data2))
```

No interaction

##### Umur_Corrected : Severity_ASD

```{r}
summary(glm(Pra_Total ~ Umur_Corrected + Pendidikan +  Bil_Anak_Autisme + Umur_Anak_Autisme + Severity_ASD + Knowledge_Total + Att_Total + Umur_Corrected : Severity_ASD , data = data2))
```

No interaction

##### Umur_Corrected : Knowledge_Total

```{r}
summary(glm(Pra_Total ~ Umur_Corrected + Pendidikan +  Bil_Anak_Autisme + Umur_Anak_Autisme + Severity_ASD + Knowledge_Total + Att_Total + Umur_Corrected : Knowledge_Total , data = data2))
```

No interaction

##### Umur_Corrected : Att_Total

```{r}
summary(glm(Pra_Total ~ Umur_Corrected + Pendidikan +  Bil_Anak_Autisme + Umur_Anak_Autisme + Severity_ASD + Knowledge_Total + Att_Total + Umur_Corrected : Att_Total , data = data2))
```

No interaction

##### Pendidikan : Bil_Anak_Autisme

```{r}
summary(glm(Pra_Total ~ Umur_Corrected + Pendidikan +  Bil_Anak_Autisme + Umur_Anak_Autisme + Severity_ASD + Knowledge_Total + Att_Total + Pendidikan : Bil_Anak_Autisme , data = data2))
```

No interaction

##### Pendidikan : Umur_Anak_Autisme

```{r}
summary(glm(Pra_Total ~ Umur_Corrected + Pendidikan +  Bil_Anak_Autisme + Umur_Anak_Autisme + Severity_ASD + Knowledge_Total + Att_Total + Pendidikan : Umur_Anak_Autisme , data = data2))
```

No interaction

##### Pendidikan : Severity_ASD

```{r}
summary(glm(Pra_Total ~ Umur_Corrected + Pendidikan +  Bil_Anak_Autisme + Umur_Anak_Autisme + Severity_ASD + Knowledge_Total + Att_Total + Pendidikan : Severity_ASD , data = data2))
```

No interaction

##### Pendidikan : Knowledge_Total

```{r}
summary(glm(Pra_Total ~ Umur_Corrected + Pendidikan +  Bil_Anak_Autisme + Umur_Anak_Autisme + Severity_ASD + Knowledge_Total + Att_Total + Pendidikan : Knowledge_Total , data = data2))
```

No interaction

##### Pendidikan : Att_Total

```{r}
summary(glm(Pra_Total ~ Umur_Corrected + Pendidikan +  Bil_Anak_Autisme + Umur_Anak_Autisme + Severity_ASD + Knowledge_Total + Att_Total + Pendidikan : Att_Total , data = data2))
```

No interaction

##### Bil_Anak_Autisme : Umur_Anak_Autisme

```{r}
summary(glm(Pra_Total ~ Umur_Corrected + Pendidikan +  Bil_Anak_Autisme + Umur_Anak_Autisme + Severity_ASD + Knowledge_Total + Att_Total + Bil_Anak_Autisme : Umur_Anak_Autisme , data = data2))
```

No interaction

##### Bil_Anak_Autisme : Severity_ASD

```{r}
summary(glm(Pra_Total ~ Umur_Corrected + Pendidikan +  Bil_Anak_Autisme + Umur_Anak_Autisme + Severity_ASD + Knowledge_Total + Att_Total + Bil_Anak_Autisme : Severity_ASD , data = data2))
```

No interaction

##### Bil_Anak_Autisme : Knowledge_Total

```{r}
summary(glm(Pra_Total ~ Umur_Corrected + Pendidikan +  Bil_Anak_Autisme + Umur_Anak_Autisme + Severity_ASD + Knowledge_Total + Att_Total + Bil_Anak_Autisme : Knowledge_Total , data = data2))
```

No interaction

##### Bil_Anak_Autisme : Att_Total

```{r}
summary(glm(Pra_Total ~ Umur_Corrected + Pendidikan +  Bil_Anak_Autisme + Umur_Anak_Autisme + Severity_ASD + Knowledge_Total + Att_Total + Bil_Anak_Autisme : Att_Total , data = data2))
```

No interaction

##### Umur_Anak_Autisme : Severity_ASD

```{r}
summary(glm(Pra_Total ~ Umur_Corrected + Pendidikan +  Bil_Anak_Autisme + Umur_Anak_Autisme + Severity_ASD + Knowledge_Total + Att_Total + Umur_Anak_Autisme : Severity_ASD , data = data2))
```

No interaction

##### Umur_Anak_Autisme : Knowledge_Total

```{r}
summary(glm(Pra_Total ~ Umur_Corrected + Pendidikan +  Bil_Anak_Autisme + Umur_Anak_Autisme + Severity_ASD + Knowledge_Total + Att_Total + Umur_Anak_Autisme :Knowledge_Total , data = data2))
```

No interaction

##### Umur_Anak_Autisme : Att_Total

```{r}
summary(glm(Pra_Total ~ Umur_Corrected + Pendidikan +  Bil_Anak_Autisme + Umur_Anak_Autisme + Severity_ASD + Knowledge_Total + Att_Total + Umur_Anak_Autisme :Att_Total , data = data2))
```

No interaction

##### Severity_ASD : Knowledge_Total

```{r}
summary(glm(Pra_Total ~ Umur_Corrected + Pendidikan +  Bil_Anak_Autisme + Umur_Anak_Autisme + Severity_ASD + Knowledge_Total + Att_Total + Severity_ASD :Knowledge_Total , data = data2))
```

No interaction

##### Severity_ASD : Att_Total

```{r}
summary(glm(Pra_Total ~ Umur_Corrected + Pendidikan +  Bil_Anak_Autisme + Umur_Anak_Autisme + Severity_ASD + Knowledge_Total + Att_Total + Severity_ASD : Att_Total , data = data2))
```

No interaction

##### Knowledge_Total : Att_Total

```{r}
summary(glm(Pra_Total ~ Umur_Corrected + Pendidikan +  Bil_Anak_Autisme + Umur_Anak_Autisme + Severity_ASD + Knowledge_Total + Att_Total + Knowledge_Total : Att_Total , data = data2))
```

No interaction

Preliminary final model

```{r}
mlr_pra_prelim <- lm(Pra_Total ~ Umur_Corrected + Pendidikan +  Bil_Anak_Autisme + Umur_Anak_Autisme + Severity_ASD + Knowledge_Total + Att_Total, data = data2)
summary(mlr_pra_prelim)
```

### Model fit assessment

#### Percentage of variance explained, R2

```{r}
rsq(mlr_pra_prelim, adj = TRUE)
```

#### Histogram and box-and-whiskers plot

To assess the normality of raw/unstandardized residuals of the MLR model.

```{r}
rraw_pra <- resid(mlr_pra_prelim)
hist(rraw_pra)
```

#### Normality of residuals

```{r}
plot(mlr_pra_prelim, which = 2)  # Q-Q plot
shapiro.test(resid(mlr_pra_prelim))
```

#### Scatter plots

standardized residuals vs standardized predicted values plot

```{r}
rstd_pra <- rstandard(mlr_pra_prelim)  # standardized residuals
pstd_pra <- scale(predict(mlr_pra_prelim))  # standardized predicted values
plot(rstd_pra ~ pstd_pra, xlab = "Std predicted", ylab = "Std residuals")
abline(0, 0)  # normal, linear, equal variance
```

linear relationship between the raw residuals and the observed values of the numerical predictors

```{r}
plot(rraw_pra ~ data2$Pra_Total, xlab = "Practice Total", ylab = "Raw Residuals")
abline(0, 0)
```

```{r}
plot(mlr_pra_prelim, which = 1)
```

## Final Model Practice

```{r}
tbl_kap_pra <- tbl_regression(
  mlr_pra_prelim,
  exponentiate = FALSE,
  conf.int = TRUE) %>%
  add_significance_stars() %>%
  bold_p(t = 0.05) %>%
  bold_labels()%>%
  add_glance_source_note()
tbl_kap_pra
```

```{r}
tbl_kap_pra <- tbl_regression(
  mlr_pra_prelim,
  exponentiate = FALSE,
  conf.int = TRUE) 
tbl_kap_pra
```
